mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO agents_upload ( agent_id, agent_name, agent_description,
agent_avatar, agent_variables_in, agent_variables_out, agent_n8n_json, agent_url ) VALUES ( #{agentId}, #{agentName}, #{agentDescription},
#{agentAvatar}, #{agentVariablesIn}, #{agentVariablesOut}, #{agentN8nJson}, #{agentUrl} )

INSERT INTO agents ( agent_id, agent_name, agent_description, agent_avatar, connector_user_id, user_id,
publish_status, source, agent_variables ) VALUES ( #{dto.agentId}, #{dto.agentName}, #{dto.agentDescription}, #{dto.agentAvatar}, #{dto.connectorUserId}, #{dto.userId},
'draft', 'n8n' , #{in} )
INSERT INTO zhs_agent_examine ( agent_id, agent_name, status ) VALUES ( #{agentId}, #{agentName}, '1' )
mapper.select: SELECT agent_variables_in AS agentVariablesIn, agent_variables_out AS agentVariablesOut FROM agents_upload WHERE agent_id = #{agentId}
